name: copilot-protection
notes: Scenario profile for Copilot DLP Guardrails demo in GCC.

GCC only supports label-based Copilot DLP policies. SIT-based conditions (sensitive info types in prompts) are not supported for Copilot DLP rules in GCC — only label-based content blocking is available.
DLP Copilot location support may have delayed rollout in GCC — validate `Locations` + `EnforcementPlanes` parameters on New-DlpCompliancePolicy in tenant before demo.
Microsoft 365 Copilot availability in GCC may lag behind commercial. Confirm Copilot licensing and feature parity before deployment.

testUsers.note: Demo identities and Copilot user groups.

sensitivityLabels.note: Confidential and Highly Confidential label hierarchies for Copilot blocking.

dlp.note: Label-based Copilot content blocking only. SIT-based Copilot DLP is not supported in GCC. `Locations` + `EnforcementPlanes` parameters on New-DlpCompliancePolicy must be available in GCC tenant.

auditConfig.note: CopilotInteraction and DlpRuleMatch audit searches. Copilot audit events must be available in GCC tenant.

testData.note: Seeded emails and documents with sensitive content for demo.
